title: How Revolve Is Growing Its Beauty Category
text: Revolve Group's beauty category has emerged as a significant growth driver. The company reported 34% year-over-year growth in beauty category net sales in Q1 2024, with the category becoming an increasingly important component of overall revenue. Beauty shoppers on Revolve can expect to see new beauty brands hitting Revolve's sales channels and more Revolve beauty partnerships, including a partnership that had been in the works for 10 months and was expected to be a big moment. The successful launch of Grow-Good Beauty hair care products in partnership with Cardi B, which sold out in less than an hour and accumulated 640,000 Instagram followers within weeks, demonstrates the market opportunity and consumer enthusiasm for celebrity-backed beauty brands on the platform. The beauty category expansion aligns with Revolve's broader strategy of diversifying adjacent product categories beyond apparel, including men's fashion and home goods, all of which have shown strong double-digit growth rates.
